title: bromus rigidus f. asperipes
intro: Bromus rigidus f. asperipes, also known as the rough-stemmed brome, is a type of grassy plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus rigidus f. asperipes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
